CVE-2014-8651.title: The KDE Clock KCM policykit helper in kde-workspace before 4.11.1 ...
CVE-2014-8651.description: The KDE Clock KCM policykit helper in kde-workspace before 4.11.14 and plasma-desktop before 5.1.1 allows local users to gain privileges via a crafted ntpUtility (ntp utility name) argument.

CVE-2015-1308.title: kde-workspace 4.2.0 and plasma-workspace before 5.1.95 allows rem ...
CVE-2015-1308.description: kde-workspace 4.2.0 and plasma-workspace before 5.1.95 allows remote attackers to obtain input events, and consequently obtain passwords, by leveraging access to the X server when the screen is locked.
